case_title: BONNEFIN CHIROPRACTIC OFFICE VS ARBOIT MICHAEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $293.00 FILED BY BONNEFIN CHIROPRACTIC OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARBOIT MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONNEFIN CHIROPRACTIC OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARBOIT MICHAEL $293.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $333.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

UNTIMELY SERVICE; DEFT WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 10 DAYS NOTICE IN S.F. COUNTY.
